title: .NET Backend Engineer
responsibilities: develop and maintain .NET services; integrate databases and internal systems; improve code quality, observability, and deployment flow
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in c#, .net, asp.net core, sql server, entity framework. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: BrightLabs is hiring a middle .net backend engineer to support building enterprise backend systems and internal business applications.
raw_text: Vacancy V075: .NET Backend Engineer at BrightLabs. Location: Warsaw. Employment: contract. Required experience: 2.6 years. Required skills: c#, .net, asp.net core, sql server, entity framework, xunit, rest api, redis. Optional skills: kubernetes, message queues. Responsibilities: develop and maintain .NET services; integrate databases and internal systems; improve code quality, observability, and deployment flow.
